use_cases: Showcasing product features on landing pages with an asymmetric grid layout
Displaying dashboard widgets in a visually organized bento-style grid
Presenting team members, services, or portfolio items in an engaging card format
Creating feature comparison sections with expandable plus cards
Building responsive product showcase sections with dark mode support
ai_summary: A bento-style card grid component featuring multiple feature cards in an asymmetric layout, with dark mode support and responsive design. The PlusCard variant includes dashed borders and corner icons for expandable content. Built for showcasing features, services, or products in a modern, organized grid pattern suitable for landing pages and dashboards.
